calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jan-22-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Defendant/Judgment Debtor STANLEY M WONG present in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS' HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

Matter discussed.

The Court rules as follows: Defendant Stanley M. Wong's claim of exemption is denied without prejudice. If Mr. Wong pursues another claim of exemption, Mr. Wong should address in that claim the issues raised by the Court concerning equity and concerning proof of disability/health expenses.

Order signed with copies mailed to parties and levying officer.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
